ast.name: text
ast.source: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
ast.target: 成就伟业的唯一途径是热爱你所做的事。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
ast.target: 创新区分领导者与追随者。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Life is what happens when you are busy making other plans.
ast.target: 生活就是当你忙于制定其他计划时发生的事情。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
ast.target: 我们生活的目的是快乐。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Get busy living or get busy dying.
ast.target: 要么忙于生存，要么赶着去死。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.
ast.target: 你只活一次，但如果活得精彩，一次足矣。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
ast.target: 在困难之中蕴藏着机遇。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Imagination is more important than knowledge.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.
ast.target: 生活其实很简单，但我们坚持要把它变得复杂。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The unexamined life is not worth living.
ast.target: 未经审视的人生不值得过。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 将你的伤痛转化为智慧。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The mind is everything. What you think you become.

ast.name: text
ast.source: An unexamined life is not worth living.
ast.target: 未经审视的人生不值得过。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Eighty percent of success is showing up.
ast.target: 百分之八十的成功是出席。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
ast.target: 种树的最佳时间是20年前，其次是现在。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.
ast.target: 正是在最黑暗的时刻，我们才必须集中精力看到光明。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.
ast.target: 唯一不可能完成的旅程是你从未开始的那一段。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Believe you can and you are halfway there.
ast.target: 相信自己，你已经成功了一半。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Everything you can imagine is real.
ast.target: 你能想象的一切都是真实的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
ast.target: 尽你所能，用你所有，在你所在之处。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.
ast.target: 如果你想提升自己，就先提升别人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: What we achieve inwardly will change outer reality.
ast.target: 我们内在的成就将改变外在的现实。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
ast.target: 开始的方法就是停止空谈，开始行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.
ast.target: 如果生活可以预测，那它就不再是生活，而是失去了风味。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.
ast.target: 将爱传播到你去的每个地方。不要让任何一个人来到你面前却没有变得更快乐。

ast.name: text
ast.source: When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.
ast.target: 当你走到绳子的尽头时，在上面打个结，然后坚持住。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.
ast.target: 永远记住，你是绝对独一无二的，就像其他每个人一样。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
ast.target: 未来属于那些相信自己梦想之美的人。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It is never too late to be what you might have been.
ast.target: 成为你可能成为的人，永远不会太晚。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
ast.target: 成功不是终点，失败也不是末日：重要的是继续前进的勇气。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
ast.target: 只要你不停下来，走得慢也没关系。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.
ast.target: 万物皆有美，但并非人人都能看见。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The best revenge is massive success.
ast.target: 最好的报复是巨大的成功。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Nothing is impossible, the word itself says "I'm possible"!
ast.target: 没有不可能，这个词本身就说“我是可能的”！

ast.name: text
ast.source: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
ast.target: 我们身后的和面前的，与我们内心所蕴藏的相比，都是微不足道的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Happiness is not something readymade. It comes from your own actions.
ast.target: 幸福不是现成的东西，它来自你自己的行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Well done is better than well said.
ast.target: 做得好比说得好更重要。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
ast.target: 对明天实现的唯一限制，将是我们今天的怀疑。

ast.name: text
ast.source: It always seems impossible until it is done.
ast.target: 在事情完成之前，似乎总是不可能的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: We must be the change we wish to see in the world.
ast.target: 我们必须成为我们希望在世界上看到的改变。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
ast.target: 生命中最伟大的荣耀不在于从不跌倒，而在于每次跌倒后都能重新站起来。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In three words I can sum up everything I have learned about life: it goes on.
ast.target: 用三个词我可以总结我学到的一切关于生活：它继续前行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: If you look at what you have in life, you will always have more.
ast.target: 如果你看看生活中所拥有的，你总会拥有更多。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.
ast.target: 生活是一连串的教训，必须亲身经历才能理解。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
ast.target: 你错过100%的你没有尝试的投篮。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.
ast.target: 无论你认为自己能还是不能，你都是对的。

ast.name: text
ast.source: I have not failed. I have just found 10,000 ways that do not work.
ast.target: 我没有失败，我只是发现了一万种行不通的方法。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.
ast.target: 一个从未犯过错误的人，从未尝试过任何新事物。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
ast.target: 领先的秘诀是开始行动。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
ast.target: 质量不是一种行为，而是一种习惯。

ast.name: text
ast.source: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
ast.target: 我们重复做什么，就会成为什么。因此，卓越不是一种行为，而是一种习惯。

regex.source: text:`The only way to do great work is to love what you do.`
regex.target: text:`The only way to do great work is to love what you do.`

regex.source: text:`Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.`
regex.target: text:`Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.`

regex.source: text:`Life is what happens when you are busy making other plans.`
regex.target: text:`Life is what happens when you are busy making other plans.`

regex.source: text:`The purpose of our lives is to be happy.`
regex.target: text:`The purpose of our lives is to be happy.`

regex.source: text:`Get busy living or get busy dying.`
regex.target: text:`Get busy living or get busy dying.`

regex.source: text:`You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.`
regex.target: text:`You only live once, but if you do it right, once is enough.`

regex.source: text:`In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.`
regex.target: text:`In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.`

regex.source: text:`Imagination is more important than knowledge.`
regex.target: text:`Imagination is more important than knowledge.`

regex.source: text:`Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.`
regex.target: text:`Life is really simple, but we insist on making it complicated.`

regex.source: text:`The unexamined life is not worth living.`
regex.target: text:`The unexamined life is not worth living.`

regex.source: text:`The mind is everything. What you think you become.`
regex.target: text:`The mind is everything. What you think you become.`

regex.source: text:`An unexamined life is not worth living.`
regex.target: text:`An unexamined life is not worth living.`

regex.source: text:`Eighty percent of success is showing up.`
regex.target: text:`Eighty percent of success is showing up.`

regex.source: text:`It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.`
regex.target: text:`It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.`

regex.source: text:`The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.`
regex.target: text:`The only impossible journey is the one you never begin.`

regex.source: text:`Believe you can and you are halfway there.`
regex.target: text:`Believe you can and you are halfway there.`

regex.source: text:`Everything you can imagine is real.`
regex.target: text:`Everything you can imagine is real.`

regex.source: text:`Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.`
regex.target: text:`Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.`

regex.source: text:`If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.`
regex.target: text:`If you want to lift yourself up, lift up someone else.`

regex.source: text:`What we achieve inwardly will change outer reality.`
regex.target: text:`What we achieve inwardly will change outer reality.`

regex.source: text:`The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.`
regex.target: text:`The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.`

regex.source: text:`If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.`
regex.target: text:`If life were predictable it would cease to be life, and be without flavor.`

regex.source: text:`Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.`
regex.target: text:`Spread love everywhere you go. Let no one ever come to you without leaving happier.`

regex.source: text:`When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.`
regex.target: text:`When you reach the end of your rope, tie a knot in it and hang on.`

regex.source: text:`Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.`
regex.target: text:`Always remember that you are absolutely unique. Just like everyone else.`

regex.source: text:`The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.`
regex.target: text:`The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.`

regex.source: text:`It is never too late to be what you might have been.`
regex.target: text:`It is never too late to be what you might have been.`

regex.source: text:`Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.`
regex.target: text:`Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.`

regex.source: text:`It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.`
regex.target: text:`It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.`

regex.source: text:`Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.`
regex.target: text:`Everything has beauty, but not everyone sees it.`

regex.source: text:`The best revenge is massive success.`
regex.target: text:`The best revenge is massive success.`

regex.source: text:`Nothing is impossible, the word itself says "I'm possible"!`
regex.target: text:`Nothing is impossible, the word itself says "I'm possible"!`

regex.source: text:`What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.`
regex.target: text:`What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.`

regex.source: text:`Happiness is not something readymade. It comes from your own actions.`
regex.target: text:`Happiness is not something readymade. It comes from your own actions.`

regex.source: text:`Well done is better than well said.`
regex.target: text:`Well done is better than well said.`

regex.source: text:`The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.`
regex.target: text:`The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.`

regex.source: text:`It always seems impossible until it is done.`
regex.target: text:`It always seems impossible until it is done.`

regex.source: text:`We must be the change we wish to see in the world.`
regex.target: text:`We must be the change we wish to see in the world.`

regex.source: text:`The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.`
regex.target: text:`The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.`

regex.source: text:`In three words I can sum up everything I have learned about life: it goes on.`
regex.target: text:`In three words I can sum up everything I have learned about life: it goes on.`

regex.source: text:`If you look at what you have in life, you will always have more.`
regex.target: text:`If you look at what you have in life, you will always have more.`

regex.source: text:`Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.`
regex.target: text:`Life is a succession of lessons which must be lived to be understood.`

regex.source: text:`You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.`
regex.target: text:`You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.`

regex.source: text:`Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.`
regex.target: text:`Whether you think you can or you think you can't, you're right.`

regex.source: text:`I have not failed. I have just found 10,000 ways that do not work.`
regex.target: text:`I have not failed. I have just found 10,000 ways that do not work.`

regex.source: text:`A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.`
regex.target: text:`A person who never made a mistake never tried anything new.`

regex.source: text:`The secret of getting ahead is getting started.`
regex.target: text:`The secret of getting ahead is getting started.`

regex.source: text:`Quality is not an act, it is a habit.`
regex.target: text:`Quality is not an act, it is a habit.`

regex.source: text:`We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.`
regex.target: text:`We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.`
